notes: Output is {"added":[ids]} with ids=make([]string,len(tasks)) so never null; exit codes 1(validation)/2(usage/file)/3(file) correct; §6.1 rule7 honored — decoder detail goes in hint not error (L64,L112); all error paths carry actionable hints (L167,L212,L217). Early return at L160 guards empty batch.

TestAdd_NormalizesSlicesToEmptyOnWrite (L206-222) asserts depends_on/source_sections/tags serialize as [] not null; TestLint_StructuredElementsEmptyAreArrayNotNull (L242-258) and TestStats_TagsEmptyIsArrayNotNull (L269-281) assert [] for empty collections; exit-code/hint-shape tests (L46-155) lock the contract.

auditResult slices (Files/Checklist/Prompts) always assigned make-init or non-nil selectors so [] never null; checklist_summary.by_type is make(map)→{}; SkippedRoles omitempty + only when !IsCompact() (L298-303); compactAuditChecklist drops FileSummary + truncates text (L334-341); suggested_files on exit-4 path bypasses compact (L714-719). Exit codes 0/2/3/4 correct.

TestAuditSuggestedFilesEmpty (L111-123) and TestAuditAffectedFromTasksEmpty (L182-194) assert suggested_files is a JSON [] (type-asserted []any) not null when empty; TestAuditSuggestedFilesSurvivesCompact (L149-161) locks §8.4 decision-critical survival through --compact; exit-4 + hint naming both --affected-files and --affected-from-tasks verified.

by_status/by_role are make(map)→{}; rows/dedupAuditRows return make([]...,0)→[] never null; overlap_report omitted under IsCompact() (L85-87); exit codes 0(clean)/2(no files,spec positional L20-38)/3(missing file L118-121) correct; malformed/incomplete rows skipped with stderr warning, not fatal (§3.3 rows 2-3).

DedupAndStatusSummary (L17-54) asserts merged_count/findings/by_status numeric shape; EmptyInputSucceeds (L59-75) and OnlyMalformedSucceeds (L81-103) lock §3.3 rows 2-3 (exit 0, merged_count 0, empty -o file); NoInputFilesExit2 (L107) and MissingFileExit3 (L116) and RejectsSpecPositionalExit2 (L128-142) cover exit-code contract.

computeAuditOverlapReport delegates to engine.OverlapReport which returns make([]RoleOverlap,0)→[] never null; latestAuditRoundOverlapReport returns explicit []engine.RoleOverlap{} on every edge case (no rounds L45, empty File L49, read error L53); clusters non-PASS rows only; output sorted by role in OverlapReport (deterministic).

BodyOrderAndEmbedding (L13-67) asserts §3.1 section order Role<Rules<SpecExcerpt<Checklist<Files<Schema and that checklist_items carry non-empty expected_evidence; DeterministicRegeneration (L69-94) asserts byte-identical repeat output (no map-iteration leak) and stable finding-N ids — locks determinism contract.

runAuditStatus always emits max_rounds/rounds_remaining (null when uncapped L193-194) and in_flight_round (int or null L198-202) — decision-critical, survive compact; budget_exhausted present only when capped, matching the tested review parity contract (review_status_test.go L28-29); runAuditRecord output is flat scalars (no nil-slice risk); overlap_report omitted under compact (L178-180).

buildRolePrompt (L119-167) assigns ChecklistItems/AffectedFiles directly from routeChecklist+selectors which all return make([]...,0)→[] never null; generateRoleAuditPrompts returns make([]auditPrompt,0)/make([]SkippedRole,0); role ordering fixed (spec-coverage,security,maintainability); determinism via sort.SliceStable in routeChecklist and sorted selectors.

readBulkTasks uses bufio.Scanner with the DEFAULT 64KB buffer and never checks scanner.Err(); a bulk NDJSON line >64KB silently truncates the staged task list with no error or warning — the exact class fixed in audit_merge.go this round (which both raised the buffer to 1MB AND checked scanner.Err()). Single-add path and the locked read+write (engine.WithFileLock at L183) are correct; model.WriteTaskFile writes 0o600.
Test file. All file/git ops use require.NoError/assert; writes use 0o600; task-file locking is exercised via the runTP subprocess under test. No go-safety defects.

LoadReviewState fix HOLDS (L198-211: IsMissingStateIndex->nil, else exitStateError). Remaining: readFindings (L603-631) and execGitDiff (L448-464) use bufio.Scanner with no scanner.Err() check — same class as the fixed audit_merge.go bug; readFindings additionally swallows the os.ReadFile error on the user-provided --findings path, silently yielding zero finding entries instead of surfacing the missing/unreadable file. Prompt emission, recordAuditRoundEntry, and status paths are correct.
Test file. git exec errors checked via require.NoError; test fixtures written with 0o600; no swallowed errors or unsafe I/O.

scanner.Err() fix HOLDS (L158-160 emits a warning naming the file and 1MB cap). f.Close() is reached on every path (inner continues target scanner.Scan, not the file loop — no leak); --merge output written with 0o600 (L90); missing-file os.IsNotExist->exit 3; spec-looking positional rejected at entry. No remaining go-safety defects.
Test file. Fixtures written with 0o600; exit-code and stderr assertions cover the merge error contract. No go-safety defects.

Pure data processing with asString() guarding map lookups. latestAuditRoundOverlapReport returns [] on parseNDJSONFile error — documented graceful degradation for an OPTIONAL explanatory overlap_report field, not a load-bearing write. Paths built with filepath.Join (L51). No safety defects.
Test file. Fixtures written with 0o600; assertions validate prompt body order, embedding, and determinism. No go-safety defects.

recordAuditRoundEntry wraps LoadReviewState+WriteFile+SaveReviewState in WithReviewStateLock and propagates every error via return (%w in countAuditFindings L128); round file written 0o600 via filepath.Join (L99). runAuditStatus surfaces LoadReviewState/SpecHash/output.JSON errors. ComputeRolesHash '_' (L90,L166) is deliberate — hash is display-only staleness metadata, not correctness; matches codebase convention.

Prompt-building file with no task-file writes (no lock needed). json.Marshal(item) '_' (L138) is safe — ChecklistItem holds only string/int fields, which cannot fail to marshal. exec/ReadFile swallows in claudeMDExcerptFor/auditDiffStats/auditDeletedFiles/auditTasksOf are documented graceful degradations for optional metadata (CLAUDE.md excerpt, diff stats, spec-adjacent task file). Paths use filepath.Join.

Clean. Exported/entry helpers documented (decodeTaskJSON L72, computeAccuracyRatio L124, addTasks L148). Validation delegated to shared engine.ValidateTaskEntry (no duplicated rules). The 5 var []model.Task/[]string (L100 etc) never reach output.JSON directly: empty tasks returns early at L160-161. addTasks spans ~114 lines but is one locked-write op dense with §6.1 rule comments, not branching complexity.

Test helpers documented (initEntryProject L23, errJSON L37, readRawTaskFile L197, extractSlice L260). Consistent assertion pattern across all cases; got := make([]string, 0, ...) at L177 avoids null-slice. No issues.

Only exported symbol ChecklistItem is documented (L35-36); unexported helpers carry §-referenced comments where non-trivial. No dead code (isBinaryFile→isAuditableType, gitExists/latestGitTag/execGitDiff all called). The var files []string (L163) reaching result.Files is always non-nil: derived=suggestFilesFromTasks(make L695) or resolved=DedupPaths(make, engine/fileio.go L27). Note: runAudit is a ~160-line linear pipeline (L151-310) at the upper readability bound but does not fit a reportable category and is not a regression; candidate for future helper extraction (snapshot/role-resolution/result-assembly).

All helpers documented (gitOut L16, commitFile L27, writeTaskFileRaw L36, newAuditRepo L44, doneTaskJSON L56, closeTaskFile L79); toStringSlice uses make([]string, 0, len(arr)) (L70). Each test carries a §-referenced doc comment. Clean.

Prior stale duplicate doc comment FIXED: runAuditMerge (L14-18) now correctly describes audit-result merging/dedup, mirroring tp review --merge. loadAuditMergeRows (L111) and dedupAuditRows (L167) documented. Output slices use make (rows L124, unique L172). var missing []string (L146) is an internal warning list, never serialized. Warnings via fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr) intentionally survive --quiet (data-loss signal), consistent within the file.
Every test function carries a §3.3/§4.1-referenced doc comment describing intent and expected exit codes. No slice/null concerns. Clean.

Both functions documented (computeAuditOverlapReport L9, latestAuditRoundOverlapReport L40). Early-return paths all yield []engine.RoleOverlap{} (L45,49,53) — explicit empty init preventing null-vs-[] in the overlap_report JSON field. clusters/order/roleSets are internal accumulators, not serialized.

Tests verify §3.1 body order and §3.4 role-specific excerpting; ids := make([]string, 0) (L86) avoids null. findItemEvidence (L96) is a small local helper; unexported-test-helper without doc comment is acceptable. Clean.

All four functions documented (runAuditRecord L15, recordAuditRoundEntry L85, countAuditFindings L116, runAuditStatus L138). %w used correctly for the only propagated error: fmt.Errorf("line %d: invalid JSON: %w", lineNum, jsonErr) (L128). rounds := []engine.ReviewRound{} (L161) explicitly empty. Exit-code/error patterns consistent.

All 11 functions carry doc comments (routeChecklist L26 … auditTasksOf L297). Every output-bound slice uses make (structural L32, taskItems L33, spec L43, items L89, candidates L205). var span []string (L233) is joined into a string, not JSON. No dead code, naming follows role-constants block (L18-22). Clean.

runReviewMerge accepts all-empty inputs (exit 0, empty -o file, merged_count 0 via len(unique)); missing file exits 3 (loadMergeFindings:118-121); no files exits 2 (line 16-20). Fix to the stated defect is in place.
commit.go folds closure via foldClosureCommit (amend guarded or follow-up); done.go:245-305 mirrors for --auto-commit. C1 (pre-amend) recorded as commit_sha; C2 carries done state.
ValidateTaskEntry rejects blank id/title/acceptance, missing anchor, unknown deps; add.go:60-67 rejects invalid JSON (exit 2); model/io.go:81-91 normalizes nil slices to [] on every write.
Goal-state (empty merge, converged round) is the tested happy path: loop_budget_inflight_test.go asserts empty-input exit 0 + empty -o; merge-clean-round tests cover the converged-round chain.
foldClosureCommit amends when guards hold, else followUpClosureCommit (commit.go:285-291) leaves C1 as commit_sha and produces a clean tree for tp-owned paths.
add.go validates at entry (ValidateTaskEntry + duplicate-id + invalid-JSON) before the task is appended; validate.go only reports drift on already-clean files.

skipped_roles names every non-emitted role (review.go:424-431, 748-751; audit.go:296-303); attribution_excludes surfaced in merge/status (review_merge.go:70-75, review_status.go:69-71); overlap_report in audit merge/status.
Exit constants used consistently: ExitUsage=2, ExitFile=3, ExitState=4, ExitValidation=1; root.go:159-173 maps flagUsageError→2, LockTimeoutError→4, other→1.
New fields (max_rounds/rounds_remaining/in_flight_round, bookkeeping, suggested_files) each replace an agent self-inspection; no decorative knobs added.
No new phase added; DetectPhase + Converged logic unchanged in v0.29.0 — only transparency/contract fixes layered on.
Runtime-setup guidance (sub-agent fan-out, injection duty, permission-prompt rule) lives in SKILL.md §'Driving tp from a non-Claude runtime', not in tp's Go code path.
Indices stay 0-based: resolveUsageForm const names '<0-based index>'; usage-error and merge stderr (review_merge.go:100) state the base. No renumbering.
Under commit_strategy=hc: tp done --auto-commit/bare tp done/tp commit all rejected (exit 2); only --commit/--covered-by accepted. No hc invocation, no sweep — resume reports bookkeeping instead.
Empty→exit 0 + empty -o (line 78-86); missing input→exit 3 (loadMergeFindings:118-130); no files→exit 2 (line 16-20). Covered by loop_budget_inflight_test.go + merge tests.

skipped_roles lists every non-emitted corpus role (review.go:424-431,748-751; audit.go:296-303) with reason in {no-checklist-items,no-spec-change,domain-mismatch,no-baseline}; attribution_excludes in merge/status (review_merge.go:70-75).

audit --merge emits overlap_report unless --compact (audit_merge.go:85-87); audit --status emits latestAuditRoundOverlapReport unless --compact (audit_record.go:178-180). role_attribution_transparency_test.go covers both.

max_rounds null when uncapped (line 84), rounds_remaining (line 81), in_flight_round via InFlightRound (line 89-93). snapshot-round-N.md written atomically at round start (review.go:1579); resume next_action=record-round N (resumepayload.go:150).
--affected-from-tasks audits suggestFilesFromTasks output (audit.go:164-172); exit-4 path exitAuditNoFiles emits suggested_files (audit.go:714-719) surviving --compact (emitted direct on error path).

WithFileLockTimeout retries TryLock with doubling backoff (10ms→50ms cap) until timeout; on timeout returns *LockTimeoutError; root.go:170-173 maps to exit 4 with hint naming lock path + elapsed. lock_test.go covers both succeed and timeout.
Each §13.1 row returns exit 2 + hint: invalid-JSON add (add.go:64), cobra flag-parse (root.go:163-165), dash-leading reason (usage_error.go:48-52). All non-zero error objects carry a hint.

roundedActual=roundTo(actualMin,1); ==0 → accuracy=nil + note 'duration below resolution' + excluded++ (line 129-132); summary.ExcludedFromAccuracy counted (line 170), excluded from estimation_accuracy (line 175-178); note nulled under --compact (line 69-73).

CheckEmptySections skips when next heading is deeper (line 36-38: container heading); still fires when end<start and no deeper child follows (line 39-44: empty leaf). lint_test.go:72 covers the container case.

set --workflow --project commit_strategy=<builtin|auto|hc> validates the value (line 46-52) and writes pc.Workflow.CommitStrategy (line 135-138); config.go:60 resolvedConfig annotates its source; set.go:316-318 rejects task-level with hint naming the project setter.

SKILL.md documents sub-agent fan-out, orchestrator injection duty (line 161), permission-prompt rule (line 166); REFERENCE.md:186 + README.md:371 document new fields; go test ./...=ok, golangci-lint run=0 issues (verified this audit).
--merge on a converged (empty) round creates the empty -o file; --record on it counts the round clean via countAuditFindings/loadReviewRecord (status!=PASS counting). No manual file creation needed.

--merge rejects spec-looking positional (exit 2, line 25-34; audit_merge.go:29-38); --resolve rejects spec positional naming expected form (review_resolve.go:48-55). Non-numeric index→exit 2 (review_resolve.go:59-67).

--auto-commit stages wip TF + impl→C1, writes closure, foldClosureCommit amends (guard canAmendClosure) or follow-up chore(tp): record <id> closure. commit.go mirrors; HEAD-moved falls back to follow-up.

DeriveBookkeeping classifies tp-owned dirty paths into closure/round/config, removes them from changes; resume.go:57 wires it in; resumeJSON (cli/resume.go:116-123) emits bookkeeping outside changes, unconditionally (survives --compact).

LockFilePath→.tp/locks/<base>-<hash>.lock; stale sibling removed (line 63-67); commit.go:202-204 + done.go:251 refuse .tasks.json.lock in --files; init creates .tp/.gitignore covering locks/ (init.go:97, projectconfig.go:324-326).

All §6.1 rules rejected with stated exit + hint (entry.go + add.go duplicate/JSON). model/io.go:81-91 forces [] for depends_on/source_sections/tags; structured.go:201-204 and stats.go:88-90 force [] for tables/numbered_lists/tags.

add/remove/import/set-source_* all call AutoFillCoverage when spec is readable (add.go:253, remove.go:92, importcmd.go:180, set.go:138,239); coverage.go:14 no-ops on unreadable spec; validate.go:92-101 hints the path.

ExtractSpecExcerptForTask falls back to extractSectionsExcerpt when source_lines empty: heading+body to next same/shallower heading, listed order, blank-line-joined, capped at maxExcerptChars=2000 (line 12,195).
unique clusters stream to -o (line 80) or stdout (line 97); summary.merged_count=len(unique)>0 (line 64); exit 0. Mirrored in audit_merge.go:74-87.
Empty inputs → empty ndjsonOutput → os.WriteFile creates zero-byte -o (line 80); merged_count=len(unique)=0 (line 64); exit 0. audit_merge.go:89-96 mirrors.
Malformed (line 138-141) and incomplete (line 142-145) lines skipped with stderr warning naming which; merged_count=0; -o still created empty; exit 0. audit_merge.go:139-155 mirrors.
loadMergeFindings stats each path (line 118-121) and opens each (line 126-130); missing/unreadable exits 3 before -o is written. audit_merge.go:117-130 mirrors.
Same missing-file path covers 'all paths unreadable' — each os.Stat/os.Open failure exits 3 with the error object; -o never written. audit_merge.go mirrors.
len(args)==0 → ExitUsage (2) with error object before any file touch. audit_merge.go:20-24 mirrors identically.
ValidateTaskEntry: TrimSpace(id) empty → EntryFinding{Rule:id-blank, Msg+Hint name the field}; add.go:216-220 exits 1 with the hint.
existing[t.ID] check catches duplicate against file + earlier batch tasks; exit 1 with hint 'a task with id X already exists; use tp set'.
TrimSpace(title) empty → EntryFinding{title-blank} naming the field; add.go exits 1 with hint.
TrimSpace(acceptance) empty → EntryFinding{acceptance-blank} naming the field; add.go exits 1 with hint.
len(SourceSections)==0 and TrimSpace(SourceLines) empty → EntryFinding{source-anchor}; hint names both anchors; add.go exits 1.
Loops depends_on against resolvableIDs (file + batch); unknown collected → EntryFinding{unknown-dependency} with hint listing the unknown ids; add.go exits 1.
decodeTaskJSON returns the json error; add.go emits output.Error(ExitUsage=2, 'invalid task JSON', err.Error()) — decoder detail lands in hint, 'error' stays generic. Bulk variant at line 109-115.
Pre-fix exit was 3 with raw decoder in 'error'; now ExitUsage=2 with decoder detail moved to hint. Confirmed by add_validation_test.go.
wrapFlagErrors (usage_error.go:27-31) wraps cobra flag-parse failures as flagUsageError; Execute() routes to output.Error(ExitUsage=2) as tp error object, not bare cobra text on exit 1.
usageErrorDetail detects dash-leading positional on done/close/commit (reasonCommands) and emits hint 'separate positionals from flags with --'; exit 2 via root.go:164-165.

suggestFilesFromTasks derives union of paths touched by every SHA in commit_shas of done tasks, type-filtered (audit.go:680-706); --affected-from-tasks audits that set (audit.go:164-172); exit-4 path exitAuditNoFiles emits suggested_files + hint naming --affected-files/--affected-from-tasks (audit.go:714-719), surviving --compact.

Stages wip TF + impl→C1 (commit.go:117-140); writes closure with commit_sha=C1 (line 144-151); foldClosureCommit amends only when HEAD==C1 and dirty⊆tp-written (canAmendClosure:262-281), else followUpClosureCommit:285-291 leaving C1. done.go:245-305 mirrors for --auto-commit. suggested_files reads C1 diff (audit.go:672-674).

set --workflow --project commit_strategy=<builtin|auto|hc> validates enum (line 46-52) and writes pc.Workflow.CommitStrategy (line 135-138) into .tp/config.json; config.go:60 resolvedConfig annotates commit_strategy with source layer (override/project/default); set.go:316-318 rejects task-level commit_strategy=... exit 2 with hint naming the project setter.

AutoFillCoverage called after add (add.go:253), remove (remove.go:92), import (importcmd.go:180), set source_sections/source_lines (set.go:138,239) whenever spec is readable; no-ops otherwise (coverage.go:14); validate.go:92-101 hints unreadable path.

SKILL.md documents sub-agent fan-out, orchestrator injection duty (line 161), permission-prompt truncation rule (line 165-166). REFERENCE.md:186 + README.md:371 reflect new fields (bookkeeping/guidance). CLAUDE.md QA recipe passes lint+validate. Verified this audit: go test ./... ok, golangci-lint run 0 issues.

ValidateTaskEntry covers rules 1,3,4,5,6; add.go:209-215 rule 2; add.go:60-67 rule 7 (exit 2). Nil-slice normalization in model/io.go:81-91; structured.go:201-204 tables/numbered_lists=[]; stats.go:88-90 tags=[].

extractSectionsExcerpt builds heading+body-to-next-same/shallower per listed entry, blank-line joined, capped at maxExcerptChars=2000 with truncation marker. v2_commands_test.go:402 (TestSpecExcerptParity_SectionsOnly) covers plan/show/next/next --peek + --compact omission.

Each §13.1 case returns exit 2 + hint: invalid-JSON add (add.go:60-67), cobra flag-parse failure (usage_error.go:27-31 + root.go:159-166), dash-leading reason (usage_error.go:42-55). Every non-zero error object carries a hint naming the next command (output.Error signatures throughout).

CheckEmptySections continues (skips) when end<start AND headings[i+1].Level>h.Level (line 36-38: container heading with deeper child); still appends the empty-section finding for an empty leaf (line 39-44). lint_test.go:72 'container heading with deeper child not flagged' verifies.

WithFileLockTimeout loops TryLock with doubling backoff capped at lockBackoffMax=50ms until timeoutSeconds; LockTimeoutError{LockPath,Elapsed}; root.go:170-173→exit 4 + hint. Default 5s, range 1-60 enforced (set.go:419-420, projectconfig.go:27).

LockFilePath→.tp/locks/<base>-<hash>.lock covered by .tp/.gitignore (projectconfig.go:326 want=[]{"local.json","locks/"}); stale sibling removed (lock.go:63-67); commit.go:202-204 + done.go:251 refuse .tasks.json.lock via --files; init.go:97 creates .gitignore at init.

max_rounds null when uncapped (line 84); rounds_remaining (line 81); snapshot-round-N.md written atomically at round start (review.go:1579, audit.go:216); in_flight_round via InFlightRound (engine/reviewstate.go:195-202); resume next_action=record-round N (resumepayload.go:150,166); regression baseline names snapshot-round-<N-1>.md (review.go:685-689, review_regression.go:72). All survive --compact.

Empty inputs→exit 0 + empty -o + merged_count 0; missing→exit 3; no files→exit 2; malformed/incomplete lines skipped with named stderr warning, exit unchanged (loadMergeFindings:137-145). Same shape in audit_merge.go:19-165.

--merge rejects spec-looking positional (review_merge.go:25-34, audit_merge.go:29-38); --resolve/--resolve-all take findings NDJSON as positional and reject .md (review_resolve.go:48-55,167-174); 0-based index stated in usage/help/merge stderr (review_resolve.go:25, review_merge.go:100); non-numeric→exit 2 (review_resolve.go:59-67).

roundTo(actualMin,1) at line 118; roundedActual==0→accuracy nil + note 'duration below resolution' + excluded++ (line 129-132); summary.EstimatedFromAccuracy counts them (line 170), estimation_accuracy computed only over accActual>0 (line 175-178); note nulled under --compact (line 69-73).

DeriveBookkeeping classifies tp-owned dirty (task file→closure per managed-field diff, .tp-review/→round, .tp/→config) and removes from changes; closureEntries:115 derives one entry per task whose managed fields changed since HEAD. resume.go:85 emits implement-phase guidance; both survive --compact (cli/resume.go:113-136).

skipped_roles populated from no-spec-change (review.go:703), domain mismatch (line 748), regression no-baseline at round<2 (line 749-751); [] when none (review.go:427-429). attribution_excludes only when it changes merged_count vs overlap-report count (review_overlap.go:69-71), omitted under --compact. audit overlap_report clusters non-PASS by (item_id,category) (audit_overlap.go:16).
